title: Watch: DIA’s Ki Huihyeon And Lee Sang Yoon From “Heart Pairing” Reveal That They’re Dating
content:
DIA’s Ki Huihyeon and Lee Sang Yoon are in a relationship! On June 23, Ki Huihyeon and Lee Sang Yoon revealed their relationship by jointly sharing a video of themselves together in Osaka on Instagram. Ki Huihyeon added in the caption, “Making memories through CCTV on our first trip to Osaka.” The couple also separately… Continue reading Watch: DIA’s Ki Huihyeon And Lee Sang Yoon From “Heart Pairing” Reveal That They’re Dating
The post Watch: DIA’s Ki Huihyeon And Lee Sang Yoon From “Heart Pairing” Reveal That They’re Dating appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: DIA奇熙贤与李尚允公开恋情，晒大阪旅行视频
facts_list: 6月23日，DIA成员奇熙贤与李尚允通过Instagram共同发布一段在大阪的旅行视频，公开恋情
奇熙贤在配文中写道：“通过CCTV记录我们首次大阪之旅的回忆”
summary_zh: 6月23日，DIA成员奇熙贤与李尚允通过Instagram共同发布一段在大阪的旅行视频，公开恋情。奇熙贤在配文中写道：“通过CCTV记录我们首次大阪之旅的回忆”。两人曾共同出演节目《Heart Pairing》。
